meaning: n.可尊敬之人或物,值得尊敬之性质或状态
examples: He longed to throw off the mask of respectability.
If she divorced Tony, she would lose the respectability she had as Mrs. Tony Tatterton.
On the other hand, Swiss bankers do want respectability.
Craig Gordon saved well from Daniel Agger and Maxi Rodriguez to maintain some respectability for Sunderland.
This is not going to be a sprint back to respectability for the program.
